title: Failed DELETE with PRAGMA reverse_unordered_selects
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT, amount DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO t2(value, amount) SELECT 'example', SUM(amount) FROM t2 WHERE amount > 5.0;
key_bug_features: DELETE operation fails with PRAGMA reverse_unordered_selects ON
